scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @wr3/types run build && npm --workspace @wr3/scoring run build && npm --workspace @wr3/audit-engine run build && npm --workspace @wr3/shared run build
scripts.build: npm --workspace @wr3/types run build && npm --workspace @wr3/scoring run build && npm --workspace @wr3/audit-engine run build && npm --workspace @wr3/shared run build && npm --workspace @wr3/web run build
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run test:api && npm run typecheck
scripts.dev:web: npm --workspace @wr3/types run build && npm --workspace @wr3/scoring run build && npm --workspace @wr3/audit-engine run build && npm --workspace @wr3/shared run build && npm --workspace @wr3/web run dev
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm --workspaces --if-present run test
